data.body:
[operator-attested evidence] release.yml dispatched from main + published 0.8.0:
- Run https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29468059472 (ref main, version=0.8.0). ALL jobs success: authorize (4 guards passed) -> build-once -> wheel_test -> sdist_test -> consolidate_evidence -> Publish to PyPI (approved the pypi required-reviewer gate as JoeOakhartNava) -> Create GitHub Release -> Publish to MCP Registry.
- (First dispatch 29467136412 aborted at build on a pre-existing check_build_env_locked PEP503 name-normalization bug -> filed+fixed as caressive-noteworthy-goldfish / change 731; re-dispatch succeeded.)
Published outcomes verified:
- PyPI: nava-rebar 0.8.0 served (HTTP 200), now latest (https://pypi.org/project/nava-rebar/0.8.0/).
- GitHub Release: v0.8.0 published, marked Latest, assets nava_rebar-0.8.0-py3-none-any.whl + .tar.gz + SHA256SUMS (https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/releases/tag/v0.8.0).
- Tag: refs/tags/v0.8.0 -> a7ea420b8 (release SHA), created post-publish (output, not trigger).
- MCP registry: lists 0.8.0 (io.github.navapbc/rebar).
